title: Piu's Cobblemon Adventure
description: A Cobblemon Modpack will quality of life and building additions.
body:
A modpack for the beep's village using the Cobblemon mod with additional add-ons, QoL mods for a more effective resource-gathering experience, and plenty of building and decoration mods to deck out your builds.

Experience optimized server and overall performance with Sodium, performance mods for enhancing Gameplay.
Unleash your crafting potential with Just Enough Items, a recipe mod that provides comprehensive guides for all your crafting needs.
Customize your controls and keybindings with Controlling, a mod that offers ultimate flexibility and convenience.
Finally, Navigate your surroundings with Xaero's Minimap, a convenient mod that always keeps you oriented.
